creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Tag your foodie buddies!

It’s no secret that Swiss Butter is our fave steakhouse in Dubai. We’ve dined at the Sofitel Downtown branch more than 5 times and it never fails to impress! We have to bring our friends @shielann @jedax.foodtrip over and let them try it as well. 💕

Our recent visit was during iftar, hence we received a lot of complimentary items like soup, drinks and dates. Here are our top recommendations for your visit:

* Beef Fillet in special Swiss Butter Sauce (78 AED): cooked the way you like, served with mesclun salad, freshly baked baguette, chili flakes and your choice of fries or a baked potato.
* Pain Perdu (42 AED): super soft and moist French Toast topped with ice cream and caramel sauce. Good for sharing.

📍Swiss Butter, Sofitel Downtown
🚊 Nearest metro station: Burj Khalifa/Dubai Mall
